subject: Re: surgery
body:
john Amerlin has had very serious  serious health problems... , he is going to introduce  me to his back-up

Hi Jeffrey,

I hope you had a good flight back!

The procedure was a success, I have much more blood going into my brain ,hence I will become toughter.I expect flowers.J.P.
